title: card: spawn_fetch takes owned String params that force callers to clone
description: spawn_fetch(pool: SqlitePool, post_id: String, content_html: String, data_dir: String, client: reqwest::Client, domain: String) takes owned values for post_id, data_dir, and domain. These are moved into the tokio::spawn closure and used only as &str inside it. Call sites must either clone their own strings or give up ownership. domain and data_dir in particular are long-lived values shared across spawns, so every card fetch forces an extra allocation. The pattern should use Arc<str> for shared immutable strings, or the function should take &str and let the spawn closure do a single .to_owned() explicitly where needed.
close_reason: Accepted: ponytail comment. Owned Strings required by tokio::spawn 'static bound.
